principle: Every corpus document must run through every valid convert-to-Markdown pathway. Release decisions compare current pathway results against stored pathway baselines.

swift-vision-document.notes: Apple-native OCR and structured document extraction path.

swift-speech.availability: Speech authorization and recognizer availability gated

python-fast-pdfium.notes: Bundled Python fast PDF fallback using pypdfium2, not PyMuPDF.

python-fast-markitdown.notes: Bundled Python fast non-PDF conversion path.

python-enhanced-docling.notes: Enhanced Docling conversion path used when advanced conversion is enabled.

python-ai-docling.notes: AI-assisted Docling path for advanced conversion experiments and release gates.

internal-reference-pymupdf.license_gate: May be promoted only after a commercial-license ADR and packaged-runtime validation.
internal-reference-pymupdf.notes: Reference pathway for measuring possible uplift. It must not appear in release locks or the packaged app.

internal-reference-poppler.license_gate: May be promoted only after license review, App Store packaging review, and packaged-runtime validation.
internal-reference-poppler.notes: Reference pathway using Poppler pdftotext-style extraction. It must not appear in release locks or the packaged app.

internal-reference-rapidocr.license_gate: May be promoted only after dependency/model license review, offline model packaging review, and packaged-runtime validation.
internal-reference-rapidocr.notes: Reference OCR pathway for comparing Apple Vision OCR against RapidOCR output.

internal-reference-paddleocr.license_gate: May be promoted only after dependency/model license review, offline model packaging review, and packaged-runtime validation.
internal-reference-paddleocr.notes: Reference OCR pathway for comparing Apple Vision OCR against PaddleOCR output.
